subject: goal measure report export fails in MCWC Chronic Pain Program cohort
description: Export to PDF fails silently after clicking the export button in the goal measure module. No error message displayed.

subject: SSO login loop - Billings Clinic MCWC Chronic Pain Program instance
description: After SAML assertion completes the browser redirects back to the login screen instead of the dashboard.

subject: Annual subscription invoice - MTOTA Association
description: Need a PDF copy of the FY2025-26 annual subscription invoice for our accounting records.

subject: MCWC Chronic Pain Program API rate limit too low for nightly EHR sync
description: Our EHR integration hits 429 errors every night around 2am during the scheduled sync window.

subject: MCWC Chronic Pain Program iOS app crashes after iOS 18.4 update
description: Multiple BRC clinicians reporting the app crashes immediately on launch after updating to iOS 18.4.

subject: Feature request - dark mode for MCWC Chronic Pain Program tablet view
description: Clinicians using iPads in low-light support rooms are requesting a dark mode option.

subject: Home program adherence data not syncing to coach dashboard
description: Readers complete home program check-ins on mobile but the coach dashboard shows no data for the past 48 hours.

subject: How to add a new coach to an existing MCWC Chronic Pain Program org
description: New Occupational Therapy joining Idaho Rehab next week - where do I send an invitation in the admin panel?

subject: Reader app push notifications not arriving on Android 15
description: Home program reminder notifications stopped delivering on Android 15 devices after the latest MCWC Chronic Pain Program app update.

subject: Bulk participant import CSV rejected with column mismatch
description: Uploading our 80-participant roster CSV returns a column mismatch error even though headers match the template.

subject: Request: add NPRS validation reference to pacing module docs
description: Our pain clinic would like the professional references behind the pacing thresholds documented in the help center.

subject: Hand therapy goniometry data not exporting to PDF
description: Range-of-motion measurements entered in the hand module are blank in the exported progress report PDF.

subject: Seat license count incorrect after coach offboarding
description: We removed two clinicians but billing still shows the old seat count for Bozeman Health.

subject: Offline mode sync conflict on home health tablets
description: Clinicians charting offline in the field get a sync conflict error when they reconnect at the office.

subject: Deactivated coach still receiving participant alert emails
description: A coach we deactivated last month is still receiving home program alert emails. Please confirm the account is fully disabled.

subject: CEU certificate of completion not generating for AOTA course
description: Subscribers who finished the goal measure micro-course report the CEU completion certificate fails to download.

subject: How do I configure a custom outcome measure template
description: We use a clinic-specific functional scale and want to add it as a custom template in MCWC Chronic Pain Program.

subject: Pediatric module age-band scoring appears reversed
description: Scores for the 3-5 age band display under the 6-8 band on the pediatric dashboard.

subject: remote coaching video session fails to record for documentation
description: Recorded remote coaching sessions are not appearing in the documentation tab after the visit ends.

subject: Two-factor authentication SMS codes delayed
description: Clinicians report 2FA SMS codes arriving 5-10 minutes late, locking them out during morning sessions.
